novel_features.name: Front-page diff
novel_features.description: Show what changed on the front page since last check — stories that appeared, disappeared, or moved.
novel_features.rationale: Requires SQLite snapshots of prior front-page state. Live API has no concept of 'change'.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents tracking HN signal need delta-mode, not full re-fetch.

novel_features.name: Topic pulse
novel_features.description: What HN is saying about a topic this week — score, comment, frequency by day.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates Algolia date+tag results into a velocity table; the API returns hits, not aggregations.
novel_features.why_it_matters: One call replaces N Algolia paginations and the math an agent would otherwise do.

novel_features.name: Submission tracker
novel_features.description: Track a user's submissions with score buckets, traction rate, and best posting time hints.
novel_features.rationale: Joins user.submitted IDs with Algolia hit metadata; not a single endpoint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Replaces manual per-id fetches when an agent profiles a contributor.

novel_features.name: Hiring stats
novel_features.description: Aggregate Who's Hiring across recent months: languages, remote ratio, top companies.
novel_features.rationale: Requires fetching multiple monthly threads and parsing free-form posts. No single endpoint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents matching jobs to a profile get the breakdown without scraping the threads themselves.

novel_features.name: Controversial
novel_features.description: Find stories with the highest comment-to-point ratio — the polarizing discussions.
novel_features.rationale: Pure local SQL ranking from synced stories; no live equivalent.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Surfaces dissent, not just consensus, which the homepage hides.

novel_features.name: Repost finder
novel_features.description: Has this URL been posted on HN before? Lists prior submissions with scores and dates.
novel_features.rationale: Algolia URL search composed with a per-hit score lookup.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Pre-flight check before posting; avoids dupe submissions.

novel_features.name: Story velocity
novel_features.description: Show a story's rank trajectory from local snapshots (climb, fall, stalled).
novel_features.rationale: Requires multiple sync snapshots; no live API surface for rank-over-time.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents asking 'is this gaining traction' get a trend, not a moment-in-time score.

novel_features.name: Thread tldr (structured)
novel_features.description: Deterministic thread digest: top authors by reply count, root vs reply ratio, comment heat metric.
novel_features.rationale: One-shot Algolia /items/{id} fetch + structured aggregation. No AI placeholder; computed metrics only.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents skimming a 500-comment thread get measurable signals, not opinion.

novel_features.name: Local FTS search
novel_features.description: Offline FTS5 search across every story and comment you've touched.
novel_features.rationale: Reads from SQLite store populated by sync + write-through cache. Algolia drops history.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents replaying past investigations don't re-hit Algolia.

novel_features.name: Sync foundation
novel_features.description: Pull top/best/new lists into local SQLite for offline use and snapshot history.
novel_features.rationale: Foundation enabling since/controversial/local-search/velocity. No competing CLI persists state.
novel_features.why_it_matters: First run makes the rest cheap; agents call once and read locally.

narrative.headline: Hacker News from your terminal — with a local store, full-text search, and agent-native output no other HN tool has.
narrative.value_prop: Combines the Firebase real-time API and the Algolia search API in one CLI. Sync once and run searches, diffs, and topic pulses against a local SQLite store — offline, scriptable, and agent-friendly. Every command supports --json and --select; mutations don't apply because Hacker News is read-only.
narrative.auth_narrative: No authentication needed — both the Firebase and Algolia APIs are free and public.

quickstart.comment: Pull current top/best/new stories into the local store
See HN's recent take on a topic, computed locally
Diff against last sync — only what changed

troubleshoots.fix: Confirm both APIs respond: hackernews-pp-cli doctor
Algolia indexes lag a few minutes; use stories top for the freshest list

troubleshoots.symptom: comments command timing out on huge threads
troubleshoots.fix: Use --depth 2 to cap the tree, or --flat for a linear view

narrative.when_to_use: Reach for hackernews-pp-cli when you need to monitor or analyze HN signal programmatically: tracking topics, finding reposts before submitting, scanning Who's Hiring, or pulling thread digests into agent context. The local store makes follow-up queries cheap.

recipes.title: Daily morning scan with selected fields
recipes.explanation: Top 20 with only the fields you need — ~80% smaller payload than the full --json.

recipes.title: Topic monitoring
recipes.explanation: Per-day breakdown of mentions, average score, and comment volume.

recipes.title: Pre-submit dupe check
recipes.explanation: Lists every prior submission of that URL with score and date.

recipes.title: Filter Who's Hiring for remote Go roles
recipes.explanation: Regex against the latest monthly thread. Add --json for parsing.
